    Index

    A E G I 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    authorize(IuRequestAttributes, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
    Resumes an authorization session upon return from the authorization server.

    E

    edu.iu.oidc - package edu.iu.oidc
     

    G

    getAccessToken() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the access token.
    getAccessToken(URI) - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcPrincipal
    Gets an access token issued to this principal for use with a given remote resource.
    getAcrValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the Authentication Context Class Reference values that this OP supports.
    getAuthorizationEndpoint() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of the OP's OAuth 2.0 Authorization Endpoint [OpenID.Core].
    getAuthorizedPrincipal(IuRequestAttributes) - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
    Gets the IuOidcPrincipal previously authorized for a web session.
    getClaim(String, Class) - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcPrincipal
    Gets a claim value.
    getClaimsLocalesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Languages and scripts supported for values in Claims being returned, represented as a JSON array of BCP47 [RFC5646] language tag values.
    getClaimsSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the Claim Names of the Claims that the OpenID Provider MAY be able to supply values for.
    getClaimTypesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the Claim Types that the OpenID Provider supports.
    getDisplayValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the display parameter values that the OpenID Provider supports.
    getError() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the error; SHOULD be non-null if IuOidcTokenResponse.getAccessToken() is null.
    getErrorDescription() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the OPTIONAL error description.
    getErrorUri() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the OPTIONAL error URI.
    getExpiresIn() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the number of seconds until the token expires.
    getGrantTypesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the OAuth 2.0 Grant Type values that this OP supports.
    getIdToken() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcPrincipal
    Gets the verified ID token for this principal.
    getIdToken() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the OIDC ID token.
    getIdTokenEncryptionAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE encryption algorithms (alg values) supported by the OP for the ID Token to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].
    getIdTokenEncryptionEncValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE encryption algorithms (enc values) supported by the OP for the ID Token to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].
    getIdTokenSigningAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWS signing algorithms (alg values) supported by the OP for the ID Token to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].
    getIssuer() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL using the https scheme with no query or fragment components that the OP asserts as its Issuer Identifier.
    getJwksUri() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of the OP's JWK Set [JWK] document, which MUST use the https scheme.
    getOpPolicyUri() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL that the OpenID Provider provides to the person registering the Client to read about the OP's requirements on how the Relying Party can use the data provided by the OP.
    getOpTosUri() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL that the OpenID Provider provides to the person registering the Client to read about the OpenID Provider's terms of service.
    getRefreshToken() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the refresh token.
    getRegistrationEndpoint() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of the OP's Dynamic Client Registration Endpoint [OpenID.Registration], which MUST use the https scheme.
    getRequestObjectEncryptionAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE encryption algorithms (alg values) supported by the OP for Request Objects.
    getRequestObjectEncryptionEncValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE encryption algorithms (enc values) supported by the OP for Request Objects.
    getRequestObjectSigningAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWS signing algorithms (alg values) supported by the OP for Request Objects, which are described in Section 6.1 of OpenID Connect Core 1.0 [OpenID.Core].
    getResponseModesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the OAuth 2.0 response_mode values that this OP supports, as specified in OAuth 2.0 Multiple Response Type Encoding Practices [OAuth.Responses].
    getResponseTypesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the OAuth 2.0 response_type values that this OP supports.
    getScopesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the OAuth 2.0 [RFC6749] scope values that this server supports.
    getServiceDocumentation() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of a page containing human-readable information that developers might want or need to know when using the OpenID Provider.
    getSetCookie() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcPrincipal
    Updated session cookie, populated if a state change was required while resolving the principal.
    getSubjectTypesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the Subject Identifier types that this OP supports.
    getTokenEndpoint() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of the OP's OAuth 2.0 Token Endpoint [OpenID.Core].
    getTokenEndpointAuthMethodsSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of Client Authentication methods supported by this Token Endpoint.
    getTokenEndpointSigningAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWS signing algorithms (alg values) supported by the Token Endpoint for the signature on the JWT [JWT] used to authenticate the Client at the Token Endpoint for the private_key_jwt and client_secret_jwt authentication methods.
    getTokenType() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcTokenResponse
    Gets the token type.
    getUiLocalesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Languages and scripts supported for the user interface, represented as a JSON array of BCP47 [RFC5646] language tag values.
    getUserinfoEncryptionAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE [JWE] encryption algorithms (alg values) [JWA] supported by the UserInfo Endpoint to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].
    getUserinfoEncryptionEncValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWE encryption algorithms (enc values) [JWA] supported by the UserInfo Endpoint to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].
    getUserinfoEndpoint() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    URL of the OP's UserInfo Endpoint [OpenID.Core].
    getUserinfoSigningAlgValuesSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    JSON array containing a list of the JWS [JWS] signing algorithms (alg values) [JWA] supported by the UserInfo Endpoint to encode the Claims in a JWT [JWT].

    I

    init(String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
    Initialized a new authorization session.
    isClaimsParameterSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Boolean value specifying whether the OP supports use of the claims parameter, with true indicating support.
    isRequestParameterSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Boolean value specifying whether the OP supports use of the request parameter, with true indicating support.
    isRequestUriParameterSupported() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Boolean value specifying whether the OP supports use of the request_uri parameter, with true indicating support.
    isRequireRequestUriRegistration() - Method in interface edu.iu.oidc.IuOidcProviderMetadata
    Boolean value specifying whether the OP requires any request_uri values used to be pre-registered using the request_uris registration parameter.
    iu.util.oidc - module iu.util.oidc
    IU OIDC API Module.
    IuOidcAuthorization - Interface in edu.iu.oidc
    Client application resource interface for OIDC authorization code flow.
    IuOidcPrincipal - Interface in edu.iu.oidc
    Client application view of principal user identity established via interaction with an OIDC provider.
    IuOidcProviderMetadata - Interface in edu.iu.oidc
    OpenID Connect Provider Discovery Metadata.
    IuOidcTokenResponse - Interface in edu.iu.oidc
    Encapsulates the response from an OIDC token endpoint.
    A E G I
